items.summary: Implement a resetInventory function in the Motoko backend actor that sets all product stock quantities to zero and persists the change in stable storage. The function must return a success result.

Update ResetInventory.tsx to remove the 'feature not implemented' placeholder and instead call the backend resetInventory function after the user passes the password gate and confirms the reset dialog. Show a success message in Azerbaijani on completion and an error message if the call fails.

Add a useResetInventory mutation hook in useQueries.ts that calls the backend resetInventory function. On success, invalidate the stockLevels, salesHistory, and zReport queries so all screens reflect the updated (zeroed) state.
